title: Nursery Rhyme. XCII. Proverbs.
content:
A pullet in the pen
        Is worth a hundred in the fen!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XCII. Proverbs." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
